calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-06-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Appearances:
Tomas E. Margin, Esq. for Plaintiff David Isias Cruz present with Spanish Interpreter Wilfredo Zepeda, parties were sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant, Guillermo Alberto Castaneda dba Novus Painting Company.
Principal of $21,166.50
Attorney's fees of $3,246.00
Costs of $246.00
Interest of $2,629.49.
For the total of $27,287.99.
Judgment signed in open court.

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter Eric L. Throne. Tomas E. Margain, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, David Isaias. Matter taken off calendar, no statement of damages on file. Counsel to serve same by personal service.
